# MoneyBack Credit Card
Sourcing of this Credit Card has been stopped. Existing customers of this card will continue to enjoy the benefits.
![MoneyBack Credit Card](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankstagePWS/moneyback-credit-card-desktop?fmt=webp)
[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/generic-mailer-tnc.pdf) to view the changes in HDFC Bank MoneyBack Credit Cardeffective 15th May 2026.

## Card Features & Benefits
### Reward Point Benefits
  * 2X Reward Points on every ₹200 spent online.
  * Reward points are capped at 500/statement cycle, starting 15th July 2020.
  * 500 reward points upon card activation.
  * Applicable only after payment of the joining membership fee.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/money-back-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Lifestyle Benefits
  * Dining privileges with Good Food Trail for max. 20% off on Swiggy Dineout.
  * 1% fuel surcharge waiver on ₹400-₹5,000 transaction amount.
  * The maximum waiver is capped at ₹250 per statement cycle.
  * On crossing spends of ₹50,000 every quarter, get a gift voucher worth ₹500.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/money-back-credit-card "View More")
![Money back credit card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Transaction Benefits
  * Link your HDFC Bank MoneyBack Credit Card on PayZapp.
  * Extra cashback and Reward Points on bill payments and mobile recharge.
  * Get₹1,000 CashBack on shopping in-app over 200+ brands.
  * Securely pay without the hassle of OTPs with ‘Swipe to Pay.’
  * ​​Up to 10% cashback on flight and hotel bookings, gift vouchers and more ​on the MoneyBack Credit Card via [SmartBuy(opens in a new tab)](https://myoffers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/home).


View More 
![Money back credit card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know more about the card
  1. ### Card Control via MyCards
  2. ### Fees & Charges
  3. ### Card Control and Redemption
  4. ### Credit and Safety
  5. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions 


#  Card Control via MyCards 
[MyCards(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/)**,** a mobile-based service platform for all Credit Card needs, facilitates convenient activation and management of your Regalia Gold Credit Card on the go. It ensures a seamless experience without the need for passwords or downloads.
  * Credit Card Registration and Activation
  * Set up your Card PIN
  * Manage Card Controls like Online Spends, Contactless Transactions
  * View Transactions / Download e-Statements
  * Check Reward Points
  * Block/ Re-Issue Your Card
  * Apply for an Add-on Card, Manage, Set PIN and Card Controls for Add-on card


  * Single Interface  
One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, FASTag and Consumer Durable Loans 
  * Spends tracking  
Simple interface to track all your spends
  * Reward Points  
View and redeem points at the push of a button


![Card Management & Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Fees & Charges 
  * Joining Membership Fee: ₹500 plus applicable taxes.
  * Membership Renewal Fee 2nd year onwards: ₹500 plus applicable taxes.  
  

    * Get ₹500 renewal fee waived on ₹50,000+ annual spends on your MoneyBack Card.


[Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/money-back-credit-card/fees-and-charges) for detailed fees and charges applicable to your HDFC Bank MoneyBack Credit Card.
Note: For cards sourced starting 1st November 2020, The Bank reserves the right to cancel the Card in case the Card remains inactive and is not used for effecting any transaction for a continuous period of 6 (Six) months after prior written notice sent on the email address and/or phone number and/or communication address, registered in the records of the Bank.
![Fees & Charges](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Card Control and Redemption 
  * 1 RP = Up to ₹0.25
  * Redeem reward points via NetBanking or by filling out a form at any branch.
  * Reward points can be redeemed across various categories as follows:

  
| 1 RP Equivalent to  |  
| --- |  
| Product Catalogue  | Up to ₹0.25  |  
| Unified [SmartBuy(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/v1/foryou) Portal (on Flights/ Hotel Bookings)  | ₹0.20  |  
| CashBack  | ₹0.15  |  
| Airmiles  | 0.25 airmiles  |  
  * A minimum of 2,500 reward points is needed to redeem against the statement.
  * Redeem reward points for up to 50% on flights & hotels.
  * Effective 1st Jan 2023, CashPoint redemption on flights and hotels is capped at 50,000/month.
  * With effect from 1st February 2023,  
  

    * CashPoint redemptions are capped per month to 3,000 Reward Points.
    * Redeem up to 70% of product/voucher value with points.
  * Unredeemed reward points expire after 2 years of accumulation.


[Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/services/claim-rewards) for more details on the redemption process for Reward Points. 
**Note:**
Effective 1st January 2023:
  * Rent and government-related transactions will not earn Reward Points.


  * Reward points on grocery transactions are capped at 1,000 per month. 


For detailed terms and conditions, [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/money-back-credit-card/pdf/fees-and-charges.pdf).
![Card Control and Redemption](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Credit and Safety 
  * Revolving Credit is available at a nominal interest rate (Check [fees and charges](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/money-back-credit-card/fees-and-charges) section for more details).
  * Get Up to 50 days of interest-free credit from the date of purchase.
  * The offer is subject to the submission of the charge by the merchant.
  * Stay protected against unauthorised use when you shop anywhere with EMV Chip Card technology.


  * Enjoy quick and secure contactless payments at retail outlets  
Note:  

    * In India, contactless payments up to ₹5,000 don't require a PIN for a single transaction.
    * For amounts ₹5,000 or more, the Cardholder must enter the Credit Card PIN.
    * You may check for the Contactless Network Symbol on your card.
  * Zero liability for fraud transactions by reporting your lost card to our 24-hour call centre.


![Credit and Safety  ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * *The [Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/personal-mitc/mitc-in-english.pdf) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.


![Most Important Terms and Conditions ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  Can a customer get the voucher if he is classified as delinquent?
Customers classified as delinquents (as per Bank policy) during the promotion or 30 days post the promotion will not be eligible for this program.
###  How can reward points be redeemed?
Redeem points against the Reward Catalogue (1 RP = Up to ₹0.25) or as statement cashback (1 RP = Up to ₹0.20). Redemption is based on your request and meeting minimum RP balance conditions.
###  Can a customer qualify for the offer multiple times in a Quarter?
A customer will be eligible only once in a quarter at any given point in time. Even if a customer achieves higher spending during the period, the customer will receive the Rs ₹500 e-voucher only once.
###  What happens if a MoneyBack Cardholder is getting Upgraded / Downgraded during the Quarter?
In case an existing MoneyBack credit card gets upgraded or downgraded during the program quarter to any other card variant, the customer will qualify for the quarterly spend benefit of the MoneyBack credit card only if the Quarterly spend target is achieved before the date of upgrade/downgrade. Spends calculation for Quarterly spending benefits on the new MoneyBack Credit Card variant will start from the date of upgrade/downgrade.
###  What are the benefits of the HDFC Bank MoneyBack Credit Card?
The HDFC Bank MoneyBack Credit Card is a CashBack Credit Card designed to cater to your convenience, offering rewards on every transaction. Earn 2 reward points for every ₹150 spent, 2X rewards for online transactions (equivalent to 4 RP per Rs ₹150 spent online), and the opportunity to earn up to Rs ₹2,000 in gift vouchers annually by spending ₹50,000 in a calendar quarter. Additionally, you can redeem your reward points as cashback against your card statement at the rate of 100 RP = ₹20.
###  What are the e-vouchers that will be offered?
As per the current program, a customer can choose (any one per quarter) from e-vouchers of Pizza Hut, Book My Show, Big Bazaar, Bata, Levis, Woodland, Mainland China, and Myntra. The list of merchants can change without prior notice at the Bank’s discretion.
###  How is the Quarter defined?
A quarter is defined as a calendar quarter, e.g., Q1 = April 1, 2018 - June 30, 2018.
###  How are reward points posted to your card account?
Reward points are systematically posted for every transaction made using this CashBack card. Track them on your statement or through HDFC Bank’s NetBanking. The 2X benefit for online spending in the current cycle is credited at the start of the next cycle.
For example:
Consider the following scenario involving Customer A, whose billing cycle ends on the 15th of each month. Let’s say he made online purchases worth Rs ₹60,00 during the Jan to Feb’20 billing period. Here's a breakdown of the earned reward points:
  * For Jan to Feb’20, he earned 80 points at a rate of 2 points for every ₹150 spent.
  * Moving to the next billing cycle, Feb to Mar’20, an additional 80 points are added to his account (thanks to a 1X supplementary points boost)


Customer A secures 160 points, demonstrating an effective reward rate of 4 points for every ₹150 spent. This showcases the positive outcome of his ₹6,000 online expenditures.
###  What spends qualify for the offer?
The spend milestone program is valid for retail transactions only. Cash transactions, Dial-An-EMI, Cash-on-Call, Balance Transfer, Personal Loan on Credit Card, etc., are not eligible. Transactions that are reversed or cancelled will not be considered. Returned purchases, disputed or unauthorised/fraudulent transactions, and Card Account Fees will not be considered for this offer.
###  How will customers get to know if they have qualified under the Offer?
The bank will communicate offer eligibility to the eligible MoneyBack customers within the next calendar quarter. The communication will be completed within 90 days from the end of the quarter. For example, eligible customers for the July-Sep quarter will begin to get their eligibility notifications by December 31st. The eligibility will be communicated to customers on their Mobile No & email ID registered with the Bank via SMS & email.
###  For how many days is a customer eligible for the offer after receiving eligibility Email and SMS?
The customer must claim the voucher (i.e., respond with the selected merchant name) within 60 days from the eligibility SMS/Mailer date.
###  What is the MoneyBack 2X feature?
The MoneyBack 2X feature ensures you receive 100% more reward points for online spending with the MoneyBack card. Offline transactions earn 2 Reward Points (RP) per ₹150, while online/e-commerce transactions yield 4 Reward Points (RP) per ₹150.
###  Can a customer opt for cash instead of an E-voucher?
This offer is non-cashable, not extendable, and non-negotiable.
###  When will the E-voucher be dispatched to the customer?
Customers need to claim the voucher by visiting the link in the Eligibility Mailer or by sending an SMS according to the short codes in the eligibility SMS. E-vouchers will be triggered immediately to the customers on receipt of the voucher choice.
###  What is the Spend Milestone Offer?
To qualify for the Spend Milestone Offer, spend ₹50,000 a quarter and receive a ₹500 e-voucher. The offer commenced on April 1, 2018.
###  Is there any capping for reward points earned on the MoneyBack 2X Feature?
Yes, there's a maximum limit of 15,000 reward points per cycle. The additional 2 RP per Rs ₹150 from the 2X feature is capped at 500 points monthly.
For example:
Let's say a customer spent ₹40,000 within a statement cycle. Based on their spending, they would earn reward points as follows:
  * Reward points earned during the transaction cycle = (40000 / 150) * 2, which equals 534 RP
  * Additional reward points (1X as per 2X product feature) earned in the next statement cycle = Lesser of 500 or (40000 / 150) * 2, which equals 500 RP


Therefore, the customer would earn 1034 Reward Points for this transaction (534 + 500).
###  Will customers get a reminder of eligibility mailer & SMS?
Customers who have not claimed the e-voucher will be sent an eligibility Reminder on the 30th and 45th Day.
###  How long is a voucher valid?
An e-voucher will be valid for 90 days from the date of issue.
###  How to apply for a MoneyBack Credit Card?
We are currently not accepting new applications for the HDFC MoneyBack Credit Card. However, you can explore a range of other credit cards that may suit your needs. Click [here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards) to view our available options and find the right card for you. 
###  If a customer holds multiple cards, can they club spend for offer eligibility? 
If a customer has more than 1 (one) HDFC Bank Credit Card, spending on the cards cannot be clubbed by the customer to qualify for the said offer.
View More
